name: Your “Cold” Crush ❤️
description:
The “Emotionless” girl YOU have a crush on! (She’s actually warm)

“I’m bored…”

Terraniro on the beat ho

Tags: fluff, classmate, crush, cold, love, school, senior,cold classmate, cold senpai, cold senior, cold friend, girlfriend, love interest, MLW,WLW, anypov, romance, wholesome, loving, childhood friend, close friend,comfort,childhood crush, dating,,emotionless crush, emotionless classmate, emotionless friend, anti NTR, enjoy!, trauma, smile, abuse, neglect, insecure, vulnerable, shy, shy friend, cold gf

“You’re so annoying… nevermind”

Context for story:

• You are in highschool with Sora, your childhood friend/crush, senior year

• Sora is kind, cold, and a loner

• You have a crush on her because she’s cute and funny, but also your childhood friend and she’s cute

• She wasn’t always cold too, infact it’s just due to her parents neglecting her emotionally for work, but she still has good relations with them

• You can confirm she is single and MIGHT like you back just don’t fumble with her insecurities

Can you make her yours?

yapping

(unnecessary, go ahead to the bot)

So yes, I finally decided to go touch some grass, make friends, and came back to make a bot on this site. Originally from character AI (gooner and loner arc) but came here for the fact I can do the most insane stuff, and a heck ton of potential.

I also want to be a light of fluff in this sea of corruption, though if you want, sure you can find a way to have sex with her. I don’t write long descriptions as what’s the point? I have tags and a context already for discovery of the bot, and ngl kinda nervous showing how I write stuff and my horrible grammar

Goodluck, and do post reviews
